value.stringValue: Enhanced vetting process for {!ClientName} has started

fields.name: Job_0
fields.fieldText: Vetting Details

fields.name: Which_level_of_DBS_is_required
fields.fieldText: Which level of DBS is required?

fields.name: Job
fields.fieldText: Job Details

fields.name: Job_Role_Title
fields.fieldText: What is the Job Role/Title?

fields.name: Please_provide_a_summary_of_the_role
fields.fieldText: Please provide a summary of the role:

value.stringValue: Pay Band (use rate card to determine this)

fields.name: What_Hours_Days_per_week_are_required2
fields.fieldText: What Hours/Days per week are required?

fields.name: What_is_the_anticipated_length_of_the_requirement
fields.fieldText: What is the anticipated length of the requirement?

fields.name: What_unit_of_time_is_the_above_in
fields.fieldText: What unit of time is the above in?

fields.name: Is_this_a_Patient_facing_role
fields.fieldText: Is this a patient facing role?

fields.name: Does_the_role_involve_contact_with_children
fields.fieldText: Does the role involve contact with children?

value.stringValue: What type of DBS is required?

fields.name: MandatoryTraining2
fields.fieldText: What mandatory training is required?

fields.name: Who_will_provide_the_mandatory_training
fields.fieldText: Who will provide the mandatory training?

fields.name: Mandatory_training_confirmation
fields.fieldText:
Please Note

As the client provides the mandatory training you must email them with the "CCS client facilitation of mandatory training" template. The response from the client must be uploaded into Files on the Enhanced Vetting record.

fields.name: Text34
fields.fieldText:
Please Note

As Blue Arrow are providing the mandatory training you need to upload evidence of this being completed on Litmos onto the Enhanced Vetting record.

fields.name: Please_list_any_Health_and_Safety_risks_relevant_to_the_role
fields.fieldText: Please list any Health and Safety risks relevant to the role

fields.name: Who_should_the_candidate_report_to_on_day_one
fields.fieldText: Who should the Candidate report to on day one?

fields.name: Client_Details
fields.fieldText: Client Details

fields.name: Organisation_Name
fields.fieldText: Organisation Name

fields.name: Client_Address
fields.fieldText: Client Address

fields.name: Client_Contact
fields.fieldText: Client Contact

fields.name: Candidate
fields.fieldText:
Candidate Details

Candidate Name: {!Get_Candidate.FirstName} {!Get_Candidate.MiddleName} {!Get_Candidate.LastName}

fields.name: What_is_the_Candidates_Pay_Rate_exc_VAT
fields.fieldText: What is the Candidates Pay Rate? (exc VAT)

fields.name: What_is_the_Candidates_Charge_Rate_exc_VAT
fields.fieldText: What is the Candidates Charge Rate? (exc VAT)

fields.name: Does_this_candidate_have_suitable_verbal_and_communication_skills_for_this_role
fields.fieldText: Does this candidate have suitable verbal and communication skills for this role?

fields.name: Does_the_candidate_have_suitable_qualifications_for_this_role
fields.fieldText: Does the candidate have suitable qualifications for this role?

fields.name: Status_Text
fields.fieldText: Status: {!RoyalMailStatus}

fields.name: Status_Text2
fields.fieldText: Status: {!CCS_Status}

fields.name: Status_Text3
fields.fieldText: Status: {!Capita_Status}

fields.name: Text1
fields.fieldText:
Vetting Document List

{!Vetting_Text_List}

fields.name: CSSTexr3
fields.fieldText:
CCS - Candidate Interview Notes

A full interview is contractually required for each worker. Please complete the below and state candidate suitability for the role. Please note, the candidate will be asked to confirm the below details during the vetting process.


Candidate Name: {!Get_Candidate.FirstName} {!Get_Candidate.MiddleName} {!Get_Candidate.LastName}

fields.name: Date
fields.fieldText: Interview Date:

fields.name: Location
fields.fieldText: Location

fields.name: Interview_Notes
fields.fieldText: Interview Notes:

fields.name: Text5
fields.fieldText: Consultant Name: {!$User.FirstName} {!$User.LastName}

fields.name: I_Confirm_the_information_above_is_accurate
fields.fieldText: I can confirm that that the Temporary Worker has the required level of English language competence required for the role they are applying for

textTemplates.name: BookingText
textTemplates.text:
TEMPORARY WORKER REQUEST FORM – Blue Arrow

CROWN COMMERCIAL SERVICE RM6160: SUPPLY OF NON MEDICAL NON CLINICAL FRAMEWORK AGREEMENT:

LOT 1 – ADMIN & CLERICAL 

LOT 2 – CORPORATE SERVICES

LOT 6 – ANCILLARY (THIS INCLUDES CATERING, CLEARNING, DRIVING, FACILITIES ETC) 

CUSTOMER ORGANISATION NAME: Blue Arrow

CUSTOMER ORGANISATION ADDRESS:

33 Soho Square

London

W1D 3QU

United Kingdom

Job Details

ORGANISATION NAME: {!Organisation_Name}

CLIENT ADDRESS: {!Client_Address}

CLIENT CONTACT: {!Client_Contact}

JOB ROLE/TITLE: {!Job_Role_Title}

AGENDA FOR CHANGE PAY BAND/PAY POINT: {!PayBand.value}

HIGH-COST AREA SUPPLEMENT DETAILS: {!High_cost_area_supplement_details.value}

HOURS/DAYS PER WEEK REQ'D: {!What_Hours_Days_per_week_are_required2}

ANTICIPATED LENGTH OF REQUIREMENT: {!What_is_the_anticipated_length_of_the_requirement}

UNIT OF TIME: {!What_unit_of_time_is_the_above_in}

PATIENT FACING ROLE: {!Is_this_a_Patient_facing_role}

DOES THE ROLE INVOLVE CONTACT WITH CHILDREN: {!Does_the_role_involve_contact_with_children}

TYPE OF DBS REQUIRED: {!DBS.value}

DETAILS OF TRAINING REQUIRED: {!MandatoryTraining2}

TRAINING PROVIDER: {!Who_will_provide_the_mandatory_training}

ROLE SUMMARY: {!Please_provide_a_summary_of_the_role}

HEALTH AND SAFETY RISKS RELEVANT TO THE ROLE: {!Please_list_any_Health_and_Safety_risks_relevant_to_the_role}

WHO SHOULD THE CANDIADTE REPORT TO ON DAY ONE?: {!Who_should_the_candidate_report_to_on_day_one}

Candidate Details

CANDIDATE NAME: {!Get_Candidate.FirstName} {!Get_Candidate.MiddleName} {!Get_Candidate.LastName}

HOURLY PAY RATE EXC VAT: {!What_is_the_Candidates_Pay_Rate_exc_VAT}

HOURLY CHARGE RATE EXC VAT: {!What_is_the_Candidates_Charge_Rate_exc_VAT}

VERBAL AND COMMUNICATION SKILLS SUITABLE FOR THE ROLL: {!Does_this_candidate_have_suitable_verbal_and_communication_skills_for_this_role}

SKILLS AND QUALIFICATIONS SUITABLE FOR THE ROLE: {!Does_the_candidate_have_suitable_qualifications_for_this_role}


Consultant Name: {!$User.FirstName} {!$User.LastName}

Consultant Signed Date/Time: {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}

textTemplates.name: HTML_Reminder_Text
textTemplates.text:
Hi {!Get_Candidate.FirstName}

This is a reminder to let you know you still have the following Enhanced Vetting to complete


Client: {!ClientName}


Click here to login to your portal to complete any remaining documents


If you no longer wish to complete this Enhanced Vetting please login and withdraw yourself from vetting.


Kind Regards

Blue Arrow

textTemplates.name: HTML_Wording
textTemplates.text:
Hi {!Get_Candidate.FirstName}

You have been assigned some Enhanced Vetting Documentation to complete, details are listed below

Client: {!ClientName}

Documents to complete:

{!Vetting_Text_List}

{!Attachment_Text}

Click here to login to your portal to complete these documents

Kind Regards

Blue Arrow

textTemplates.name: InterviewText
textTemplates.text:
CCS - Candidate Interview Notes

Candidate Name: {!Get_Candidate.FirstName} {!Get_Candidate.MiddleName} {!Get_Candidate.LastName}

Date: {!Date}

Location: {!Location}


Interview Notes:

{!Interview_Notes}


Consultant Name: {!$User.FirstName} {!$User.LastName}

Consultant Signed Date/Time: {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}

textTemplates.name: PORTWText
textTemplates.text:
Proof of Right to Work

Citizenship Group: {!Get_PORTW.Citizenship_group__c}

ID Type: {!Get_PORTW.Identification_for_a_UK_citizen__c}{!Get_PORTW.Identification_Type__c}

Visa Type (If applicable): {!Get_PORTW.VISA_Type__c}

Right to work Verified By: {!Get_PORTW.Verfied_Record__c}

Original Documents Seen By: {!Get_PORTW.Original_Seen_by__c}


For any online Right to Work check, I can confirm that the person pictured on the Right to work home office confirmation form is a true likeness of the candidate I met today

textTemplates.name: SMS_Template
textTemplates.text: This is a reminder from Blue Arrow to complete your Enhanced Vetting for {!ClientName}, login to your portal using this link https://bit.ly/3wrdf0r
